extracted_information: StackBlitz offers free and paid subscription models. The free Personal plan allows unlimited public projects and GitHub repository access. Paid plans include Pro, Teams, and Enterprise, providing features like unlimited file uploads, backend/API connectivity, private collaboration, and enterprise-specific integrations. StackBlitz's WebContainers technology enables Node.js environments to run directly in the browser.

Personal.description: Start with a free account to speed up your workflow on public projects.
features: Open and edit public GitHub repositories
Up to 1MB of file uploads per project

Pro.description: For individual developers needing advanced capabilities.
features: Securely connect with backends and APIs running on localhost
Collaborate on your organization’s private GitHub repositories
Integrate with private NPM registries like Artifactory and Nexus

Enterprise.description: For large enterprises requiring custom solutions.
features: GitLab, Bitbucket, and GitHub Enterprise Support
Self hosted, on-premise, and VPC installation options

details: Open and edit public GitHub repositories
Up to 1MB file uploads per project
Secure connection with backends and APIs running on localhost
Collaborate on organization's private GitHub repositories
Integration with private NPM registries (Artifactory, Nexus)
GitLab, Bitbucket, and GitHub Enterprise Support
Self-hosted, on-premise, and VPC installation options

webcontainers_technology.description: WebContainers are a technology that allows Node.js environments to run directly in the browser.
capabilities: Enables developers to execute server-side code without leaving the browser
Enables developers to execute full-stack applications without leaving the browser
Makes development more seamless and accessible

free_tier.name: Personal
free_tier.details: Offers basic features for public projects, suitable for individual use.
free_tier.github_requirement: Requires a GitHub account to save work or collaborate; not needed to view/edit projects.

subscription_models.team_management: GitHub organization members are synced. Users can be set as free (access public) or paid (access private). Permissions mirror GitHub organization.
